_about: Approved-decision database for tool interaction contracts. One entry per tool x dimension. Agents seed future volatile matrices from here: an approved decision that maps onto a new tool (same archetype / object class) is re-proposed with high confidence. Only verdict:'approved' rows count as precedent; 'proposed' rows are awaiting user confirmation in the volatile canvas. Schema: tools.<tool>.decisions.<D##> = { behavior, source: stated|research|pattern|guess|precedent, confidence: 0-100, verdict: proposed|approved|rejected, decided: date|null }. Append-only in spirit: superseded decisions are overwritten only by a newer user approval.

D01.behavior: L key; palette: type 'line' + Enter; tools-rail icon; Space/Enter re-arms when Line was the last command (P0.4/P0.7).

D03.behavior: Armed -> FirstPoint -> SecondPoint -> Commit. Both grammars commit identically: click-move-click and press-drag-release (P2.RhinoDraft.gesture).

D04.behavior: Cursor travel > draft.drag_threshold (4 px) before release = drag grammar; otherwise click grammar.

D05.behavior: Held Shift inverts the F8 ortho state for the pending segment, 45-degree steps (P2.RhinoDraft.ortho).

D06.behavior: F8 ortho + F9 grid snap apply to both endpoints; endpoint object-snap to node edges/anchors within draft.osnap_radius.

D07.behavior: Tab locks the segment direction at its current angle; movement then only changes length; Tab again unlocks; Shift/ortho ignored while locked.

D08.behavior: After the first point, typed digits set length; Enter or the committing click places the end point at that distance along the current cursor direction. Backspace edits (P2.RhinoDraft.numeric).

D09.behavior: Rubber band from first point (constraint-resolved); dock readout shows live length + angle; numeric entry echoes next to the readout.

D10.behavior: Crosshair while armed; small lock glyph appended while Tab-locked.

D11.behavior: A parametric 2-point line node; stroke from P1.curve.create-style when the last single-node edit exists, else default_curve_stroke(fg) (Square end caps, Miter joins, 2 px); opacity from last edit or 1.0; journal cmd board.tool.line; one gesture = one undo (P0.2/P0.3).

D12.behavior: Esc during numeric entry clears the entry; next Esc removes the first point (back to Armed); next disarms to Select (P2.RhinoDraft.esc, P0.1).

D13.behavior: Endpoint grips only, no resize bbox (P1.curve.grips), single or multi-select. Homogeneous multi-line: grips on every line, no per-line outline, no group bbox handles. Grip drag moves that endpoint; ortho/snap apply.

D14.behavior: Grip drag re-journals as a point edit; Direct Selection (A) sees the same two anchors; Ctrl+J joins endpoints with other curves (P1.curve.style).

D15.behavior: Cut (Art. III): Rhino BothSides/Normal/Angled command options; length<angle typed syntax; chaining (that's the Polyline tool).

D16.behavior: Yes — last single-node edit seeds stroke + opacity (P1.curve.create-style); default stroke = default_curve_stroke(fg) (Square cap, 2 px) when none.
